criteria.name: User Ratings
criteria.description: Average rating given by users on app stores.

criteria.name: Downloads
criteria.description: Total number of downloads across all platforms.
criteria.sources: App Store, Google Play Store, Sensor Tower

criteria.name: AI Integration
criteria.description: Level and effectiveness of AI integration in the app's functionality.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, user reviews, expert analysis

criteria.name: User Interface
criteria.description: Ease of use and intuitive design of the app.

criteria.name: Update Frequency
criteria.description: How often the app is updated with new features and bug fixes.

criteria.name: Unique Features
criteria.description: Unique features that set the app apart from competitors.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, user reviews, expert analysis
